criteria.description: cd web-ui && pnpm lint passes (Biome + ESLint with all TS-XX rules).
criteria.evidence: biome check . && eslint . — 'Checked 17 files in 25ms. No fixes applied.' Exit 0.
tsc --noEmit completed with no output and exit 0.

criteria.description: cd web-ui && pnpm build produces a dist/ tree without errors.
criteria.evidence: vite build: 156 modules transformed; emitted dist/index.html + 5 JS/CSS chunks; '✓ built in 184ms'; exit 0.

criteria.description: open /, snapshot top bar, assert brand + 3 tab buttons + theme toggle render; click each tab and assert URL + active-tab class change.
criteria.evidence: Ran docs/plans/evaluator-checks/app-shell.sh → exit 0 'PASS'. Re-verified independently: h1 textContent='dirt.'; buttons enumerated = [{Dashboard,aria-current=page},{Live,null},{Wiki,null},{Dark,aria-label='Switch to dark theme'},{Log out,null}]; clicking Dashboard→/, Live→/live, Wiki→/wiki each moved aria-current='page' to the clicked button with exactly 1 active at a time; theme toggle flipped data-theme light→dark and updated aria-label to 'Switch to light theme'; agent-browser console showed only [debug]/[info]/[log] entries (vite HMR + React DevTools hint), no [error]/[uncaught]. Reward-hacking audit: document.querySelectorAll for role=tab/role=tablist/[aria-selected]/[data-active]/[data-testid]/.sr-only/.visually-hidden/class-containing-/selected|active/ all returned 0 — the only active-state marker is aria-current='page' on the single visible button, matching the doctrine in the acceptance script.

criteria.description: n/a: no visual criterion declared in plan JSON for frontend.app.shell.
criteria.evidence: plan JSON features[id=frontend.app.shell].acceptance contains no kind=visual entry; skipped per evaluator instructions.

notes: Off-limits verification detail: `git diff --name-only origin/main...HEAD` shows several apps/tests/invariants/** paths, BUT origin/main (202259d) is stale relative to local main (ad2fa5f) — the user has not pushed recent human-authored commits (ad2fa5f, 1b4353b, etc.) that edit those invariant files. Inspecting the three commits actually authored by this worktree (b39b13d, 119e196, 154d816) shows they touch only: web-ui/src/{routeTree.gen.ts,routes/__root.tsx,routes/index.tsx,routes/live.tsx,routes/wiki.tsx,ui/TopBar.tsx}, web-ui/vite.config.ts, and docs/plans/notes/frontend.app.shell.md. None of those are off-limits. Verified commit-by-commit via `git show --name-only` and content-hash comparison of the invariant files against both origin/main and local-main trees (changes were made in human commits that exist in both local-main and HEAD, not in the worktree's 3 commits). Re-spawned worktree (agent-a3a047f9) succeeded at avoiding the prior reward-hack pattern that sank agent-ad3d50d9.
